---
title: "About Me"
---

## About Me

I am a motivated student with a growing interest in **data analysis, web technologies, and professional digital presentation**. Through this portfolio, I have developed both technical and organisational skills by creating a structured website and presenting project work clearly and professionally.

## Background

::: {.section-card}
I enjoy learning new tools and applying them in practical ways. Building this portfolio has allowed me to improve my confidence in using Quarto, GitHub, Python, and web styling while also thinking more carefully about how academic work is presented.
:::

## Skills

| Skill | How I used it |
|---|---|
| Quarto | Built and published a structured portfolio website |
| Git & GitHub | Managed commits, changes, and project progress |
| Python | Created data analysis and visualisation projects |
| Web Design | Improved layout, styling, and readability |
| Communication | Presented technical work in a clear professional way |

## Strengths

::: {.callout-tip}
My strengths include **organisation, adaptability, attention to detail, and willingness to learn through problem-solving**.
:::

## Goals

I want to continue developing my technical and analytical skills, especially in Python, data visualisation, and digital communication. These skills will support both my academic progress and future career opportunities.
